text.title: Process Mining and Intelligent Automation Analysis Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end walked example applying the process-mining-automation methodology, producing a valid artefact per `02-output-contract.xml`.

section.title: End-to-end example
section.narrative: AP 3-way match → log profile OK → miner emits as-is → conformance 0.92 → matrix score 16 → verdict RPA → ROI payback 5 months → backlog item created for RPA squad.
